description: A ground-level photograph depicting a wide agricultural field covered in bright yellow flowering plants, likely rapeseed or canola, under a clear blue sky. In the background, a linear arrangement of tall, deciduous green trees forms a distinct boundary or feature. The image illustrates a "Lines of Trees and Scrub" land cover type, where trees form strips within a matrix of cultivated land. No text, labels, or temporal information is visible within the image itself.
